# Robes
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Robes&prop=wikitext

The robe is the armor for high range classes (wizard, mystic, necromancer, priest and sorcerer). It focuses on low defense and utility stats
<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 20px 20px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Speciality</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Primal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BoneSplinterRobe.png
| link = Bone Splinter Robe
| text = Bone Splinter Robe
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Legendary</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlack
| file = RitualRobe.png
| link = Ritual Robe
| text = Ritual Robe
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = CheaterRobe.png
| link = Cheater Robe
| text = Cheater Robe
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = HelasRobe.png
| link = Hela's Robe
| text = Hela's Robe
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = GravediggersDisguise.png
| link = Gravedigger's Disguise
| text = Gravedigger's Disguise
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = GarbOfTheFrozenQueen.png
| link = Garb of the Frozen Queen
| text = Garb of the Frozen Queen
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Heroic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WaterDragonSilkRobe.png
| link = Water Dragon Silk Robe
| text = Water Dragon Silk Robe
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RobeOfTheMadScientist.png
| link = Robe of the Mad Scientist
| text = Robe of the Mad Scientist
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RobeOfTheSummerSolstice.png
| link = Robe of the Summer Solstice
| text = Robe of the Summer Solstice
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = FrostElementalistRobe.png
| link = Frost Elementalist Robe
| text = Frost Elementalist Robe
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = LinenCoat.png
| link = Linen Coat
| text = Linen Coat
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BrightRobeOfTheCrystals.png
| link = Bright Robe of the Crystals
| text = Bright Robe of the Crystals
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Artifact</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlack
| file = ShendytOfGeb.png
| link = Shendyt of Geb
| text = Shendyt of Geb
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheRobeOfTwilight.png
| link = The Robe of Twilight
| text = The Robe of Twilight
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheSoullessRobe.png
| link = The Soulless Robe
| text = The Soulless Robe
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = TogaPicta.png
| link = Toga Picta
| text = Toga Picta
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = GarmentOfTheBeast.png
| link = Garment of the Beast
| text = Garment of the Beast
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = TheRiverRobe.png
| link = The River Robe
| text = The River Robe
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = TheIncombustibleRobe.png
| link = The Incombustible Robe
| text = The Incombustible Robe
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RobeOfTheNatureGoddess.png
| link = Robe of the Nature Goddess
| text = Robe of the Nature Goddess
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">
Unique
</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RobeOfTheTlatoani.png
| link = Robe of the Tlatoani
| text = Robe of the Tlatoani
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ChasubleOfHolyLight.png
| link = Chasuble of Holy Light
| text = Chasuble of Holy Light
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = CandyRobe.png
| link = Candy Robe
| text = Candy Robe
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Galactic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DeepspaceMantle.png
| link = Deepspace Mantle
| text = Deepspace Mantle
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Uncommon</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RobeOfTheMoonWizard.png
| link = Robe of the Moon Wizard
| text = Robe of the Moon Wizard
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RobeOfTheElderWarlock.png
| link = Robe of the Elder Warlock
| text = Robe of the Elder Warlock
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RobeOfTheGrandSorcerer.png
| link = Robe of the Grand Sorcerer
| text = Robe of the Grand Sorcerer
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RobeOfTheStarMother.png
| link = Robe of the Star Mother
| text = Robe of the Star Mother
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Normal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RobeOfTheNeophyte.png
| link = Robe of the Neophyte
| text = Robe of the Neophyte
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RobeOfTheApprentice.png
| link = Robe of the Apprentice
| text = Robe of the Apprentice
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RobeOfTheAcolyte.png
| link = Robe of the Acolyte
| text = Robe of the Acolyte
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RobeOfTheStudent.png
| link = Robe of the Student
| text = Robe of the Student
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RobeOfTheConjurer.png
| link = Robe of the Conjurer
| text = Robe of the Conjurer
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RobeOfTheAdept.png
| link = Robe of the Adept
| text = Robe of the Adept
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RobeOfTheInvoker.png
| link = Robe of the Invoker
| text = Robe of the Invoker
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RobeOfTheIllusionist.png
| link = Robe of the Illusionist
| text = Robe of the Illusionist
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RobeOfTheMaster.png
| link = Robe of the Master
| text = Robe of the Master
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RobeOfTheShadowMagus.png
| link = Robe of the Shadow Magus
| text = Robe of the Shadow Magus
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RobeOfTheAncientIntellect.png
| link = Robe of the Ancient Intellect
| text = Robe of the Ancient Intellect
}}
|}
</div>

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; padding: 15px;">
